scrape.title: Deep Content Analysis
scrape.desc: Extracts and reads your full webpage content including JS-rendered sections.

agent1.title: AI GEO Scoring
agent1.desc: Scores your content against 6 research-backed GEO criteria.

agent2.title: Content Rewriting
agent2.desc: Rewrites your page with safe placeholders for stats, citations, and expert quotes.

export.title: Export Ready
export.desc: Copy or download your AI-optimized content instantly and apply it to your site.

faq.a1: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of optimizing content so AI engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini can cite your website in their answers.
faq.q2: How is this different from SEO?
faq.a2: SEO targets search engine rankings. GEO targets AI citation frequency. Both matter, but AI search rewards clear facts, source signals, structure, and entity clarity.
faq.a3: GEOLens only reads public webpage content. No login data or private information is accessed.
faq.q4: How long does an analysis take?
faq.a4: Usually 15 to 30 seconds. GEOLens scrapes, analyzes, and rewrites the page using AI models.

scoreCard.strongMsg: Your site is excellent for AI engines
